title: Macropad using Raspberry Pi Pico
description: A custom macropad built using Raspberry Pi Pico and CircuitPython, designed to execute programmable macros and system controls. Supports configurable key mappings, plug-and-play functionality, and future expansion for display and rotary inputs.

title: Vishnushakti Foundation Website
description: A clean and fully responsive website developed as per client requirements, featuring a custom backend with an admin panel for managing content and data. Includes email integration and secure payment gateway services for seamless communication and online transactions.

title: E-Kaathi – Smart Blind Stick
description: A smart assistive device for visually impaired users featuring obstacle detection, SOS alert functionality, GPS-based location sharing via mobile connectivity, and adjustable vibration feedback for different alert levels.

title: A3Distributor Website
description: A business website for a water and cold drink distributor, featuring product listings, distributor information, inquiry forms, and a clean, mobile-friendly layout designed for local business operations.

title: QR Scanner & Generator App
description: An Android application that allows users to scan QR codes and generate custom QR codes for text, links, and other data formats, with a simple and intuitive user interface.

title: Dental Clinic Website UI/UX Design
description: UI/UX design work for a dental clinic website, focusing on clean aesthetics, patient-friendly navigation, service clarity, and responsive layouts tailored for healthcare users.
